allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(const f of r\){for\(const m of f.messages\){if\(m.ruleId==='no-unused-vars'&&/React/.test\(m.message\)\)continue;if\(m.ruleId==='react-hooks/set-state-in-effect'\)continue;console.log\(f.filePath.split\(/[\\\\\\/]/\).pop\(\),m.line,m.ruleId,m.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\);}}console.log\('---done---'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);let n=0;for\(const f of r\)for\(const m of f.messages\){if\(m.ruleId==='no-unused-vars'\){console.log\(f.filePath.split\(/[\\\\\\/]/\).pop\(\),m.line,m.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\);n++;}}if\(!n\)console.log\('no unused-vars beyond React'\)}\)")
